powershell_parse.command: Get-ChildItem tools -Filter '*.ps1' -File | ForEach-Object { $errors = $null; [System.Management.Automation.PSParser]::Tokenize((Get-Content -Raw $_.FullName), [ref]$errors) | Out-Null; if ($errors) { throw "PowerShell parse failed: $($_.Name)" } }

eval_framework.description: Check manual eval framework structure and internal links.

transactional_doc_tools.description: Check transactional document edit tools in dry-check mode.
transactional_doc_tools.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/documents/normalize_document_structure.ps1 -Check -Paths project/code/WORKFLOW.json; powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/documents/migrate_document_schema.ps1 -Check -Paths project/code/WORKFLOW.json

init_dry_run.description: Smoke-test code project initialization without writing files.

notes: Providers differ; CI should translate these commands into the provider's shell syntax.
The audit command is the canonical minimum self-check.
